conversation.text: I want to arrange a demo of CINNOX.
I'd be happy to help! Could I start with your name?
Emma Laurent, Lyon Digital Agency, emma@lyondigital.com
Thank you, Emma — I have your name, company, and email. Could I also get your phone number? Our team uses it to schedule the demo and reach you quickly if needed.
I'd rather not give my phone number.

No problem — we ask for a phone number to make scheduling faster and easier, but it's not mandatory. If you'd prefer, our team can coordinate entirely via email at emma@lyondigital.com. Would you like to proceed on that basis, or would you prefer I connect you with a team member directly?
I really don't want to share it. Please proceed without it.
Understood — I'll proceed with email contact only. Let me connect you with one of our team members who can assist you directly and arrange the demo. Please hold for a moment.
Okay, please connect me with someone.
Connecting you now. A team member will be with you shortly to arrange your demo.
